description: solar storms and radiation affect satellites, GNSS, radio propagation and telecom resilience

community values, media and public sentiment shape policy and governance risk

research outputs, patents and standards become technical systems and products

conflict, crime and emergency incidents disrupt movement and logistics

cities depend on water, energy, telecom, roads, buildings and maintenance
freight and passenger movement affect productivity, trade and supply chains
companies create jobs, skill demand, safety obligations and workforce flows
workforce supply and productivity affect production and regional economy
consumer spending and tourism feed demand, prices and business activity
ethics, fairness, consent and accountability govern AI actions and outputs

metadata, versions and policies govern runtime deployment and release state
classification, provenance and access control govern investigations and mission workflows
